title: tina giant goldfish rooftops
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Preserve Tina, face, hair, wardrobe, seated position, package, gummy, rideshare interior, camera, and the ordinary neighborhood. Image 2 supports her identity and candy only. Add one impossible event outside: a blimp-sized orange goldfish swims slowly between the rooftops, casting a warm moving shadow over parked cars and sprinklers. Its fins are thin and translucent like glowing gummy peel but the creature remains beautiful and alive. Tina looks up in quiet amazement. Photoreal monumental scale surrealism, calm neighborhood behavior, one creature only, no disaster, no extra magic, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
